description: Covenant Framework Agent Registry — the Book of Numbers

revelation.telos: WedFlow launches September 1, 2026: 10-12 paid couples actively using AI SMS coordination through a PWA, with a waitlist of demand from a 4-month marketing campaign and B2B2C channel partners registered.
revelation.description: The project's ultimate success condition. Set by the user via the Prophet. When fulfilled, the system has completed its purpose.

progress.assessment: Foundation laid. PWA installable, push notifications wired, landing page mobile-ready for marketing campaign. Dashboard responsive and functional. 0/10-12 couples onboarded. Waitlist capture exists but B2B2C registration flow not yet built. ~120 days remain.

agentSchema.note: Agents may have parentId (cloned) or parentIds (synthesized), never both.

shadowAgents.description: Esther — shadow registry. Background monitoring agents that don't appear in /genealogy but are visible to /audit. For ambient observation without cluttering the public tree.

agents.mandate: Build audit logging service and wire into SMS pipeline at every exit point
Build escalation email notifications via Resend when messages escalate
Make the dashboard responsive — collapsible sidebar, stacked inbox, responsive grids
Fix broken dashboard interactions — dropdowns, callbacks, feedback, error states
Replace GuestsView placeholder with real guest list UI using existing server actions
Implement service worker, offline fallback, install prompt, and manifest improvements for PWA installability
canonViolations: Canon II: not registered before acting

agents.mandate: Build push notification pipeline from Inngest escalation to couple's device
canonViolations: Canon II: not registered before acting

agents.mandate: Make all public-facing pages (landing, sign-in, sign-up) fully responsive on mobile viewports with hamburger nav, stacked grids, sticky CTA, and proper safe areas
canonViolations: Canon II: not registered before acting
Canon VII: Prophet executed directly instead of spawning

agents.mandate: Audit all internal pages (dashboard, portal, onboarding, pricing, join) for mobile usability issues and fix everything broken on mobile viewports
Fix sticky CTA to inline waitlist form, fix dashboard home image blank space, optimize guest list filters for mobile, remove readiness indicator from nav
Fix inbox reply UX for mobile and wire escalation drafts to pre-populate the reply composer

genome.maternal: interaction-fixer — reply modals, callback patterns, dropdown UX
genome.paternal: mobile-architect — isMobile prop threading, responsive dashboard layout
genome.emergent: Mobile message composition UX — thumb-zone reply optimization and auto-draft pre-fill

synthesisLog.emergentSkill: Mobile message composition UX — thumb-zone reply optimization and auto-draft pre-fill into composer

siblingLimitNote: Root exceeds 8 children (9 total, 8 archived). Acknowledged as soft violation — root is the orchestrator, not a task-scoped agent. All prior children have sunset.
